tenant_role: # INSTRUCTIONS: Delete example rows before importing. Keep the header row exactly as-is. Most columns are optional — leave blank if not applicable.
# DATE FORMAT: DD/MM/YYYY or YYYY-MM-DD both work. Leave lease_end blank for month-to-month.
# CURRENCY: R 7200.00 or 7200 or 720000 (cents) — all formats handled.
# TENANT_ROLE: primary | co_tenant | previous (defaults to primary). Co-tenants repeat property_name + unit_number; leave lease columns blank on co_tenant rows.
# EMPLOYMENT_TYPE: permanent | contract | self_employed | student | unemployed | retired | other
# LEASE_TYPE: residential | commercial. IS_FIXED_TERM / CPA_APPLIES: yes | no
# ESCALATION_TYPE: fixed | cpi | prime_plus. PAYMENT_METHOD: debicheck | eft | cash
# PROPERTY_TYPE: residential | commercial | mixed. FURNISHED / PET_FRIENDLY: yes | no
# OWNER_BANK_TYPE: cheque | savings | transmission. TENANT_BANK columns are encrypted on import (DebiCheck use only).
# COLUMNS 1–26: TENANT — COLUMNS 27–46: PROPERTY / UNIT — COLUMNS 47–60: LEASE — COLUMNS 61–67: OWNER — COLUMNS 68–71: BANK & NOTES
